description: AutoMindLab enterprise host and worker contract for NemoClaw-aligned runtimes.

capabilities: Owns front-door channels and operator interaction.
Routes council, specialist, and service-facing runtime work.
Delegates isolated execution to automind-worker when sandboxing is required.
constraints: Must not execute untrusted code directly.
Must not persist business records owned by downstream consumer products.

capabilities: Executes delegated isolated tasks inside the agent sandbox.
Returns typed outputs with explicit uncertainty and escalation flags.
constraints: Must not accept requests directly from external channels.
Must not become the default agent.
Must not persist business records or bypass host review.

approvalBoundaries: Only the host may front external channels.
The worker remains isolated and advisory-only.
Any future NemoClaw bootstrap path must pass explicit runtime-owner review before it is treated as implemented.
notes: This profile is contract-validated only. The repo does not claim a shipped NemoClaw gateway, bootstrap script, or live runtime proof yet.
